TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_msbayhuy, title = msbayhuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/msbayhuy} }

S.FORM: msbayhuy lga utux mngnguw kwara qu tyal la, ilaw utux msluhi qu taytuqi ru msbayhu qu kayal.
msbayhuy lga utux mngnguw kwara qu tyal la, ilaw utux msluhi qu taytuqi ru msbayhu qu kayal.
S.PHON: ms~ɕβajħuj lɣa utux mŋŋuw kwara qu tjal la, ilaw utux ms~ɕluħi qu tajtuqi ru ms~ɕβajħu qu kajal.
